response:
<<Blueberry Muffins and Youth>>

Emily gathered blueberries with care. David collected more than Emily. Sophia had fewer than David.

***

David collected blueberries in a way. He had more than Emily. He had three times as many as Sophia. The total blueberries were a sum. Emily had 24. David had 15 more. That made 39. Sophia had 13. The total was 76.

***

They made muffins with the blueberries. One batch needed 9. They made 8 batches. Each batch sold for 5. The total money was 40. They used all the blueberries. The money came from the sales. The youth was the result.

***

They used the money for a trip. The trip was planned with a committee. The committee decided on the destination. The trip included a baseball game. The game was in a city. The trip was a success. The youth was happy.
